item.title: Hands On Technique Of Ma Jinfu
item.description:
Ma Jinfu's hands. (Photo/Wen Sirui)
Ma Jinfu shows some of his glass paintings in Xining, capital of northwest China's Qinghai Province. Song used: Francis Lai's OST of this movie: The Private Lesson (1968) #skills #awesome #art #aww #creativity

item.title: RIP: Jim Smith
item.description: "Before his rise to fame, Smith honed his skills as a storyboard artist on shows like The Real Ghostbusters, contributing to several fan-favorite episodes. Among his long list of credits, Smith's impressive résumé includes work on Mighty Mouse: The New Adventures, Tiny Toon Adventures, Batman: The Animated Series, Samurai Jack, and Over the Garden Wall."
item.dc:creator: awesomeoldguy

I do some reviews as a hobby, and this week I reviewed the indie game "Mighty Goose" if you're interested, see it here! https://youtu.be/RIjhl2KKRo4 If you want to read my other reviews, check https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: What Happened Today #96
item.description:
(oops, someone needs to fix the column spacing)
? 34 headlines in one night is double the 60 day average. All of today's important news wouldn’t fit on a normal GovBrief so it had to be redesigned. This avalanche of moves from courts to agencies to borders shreds checks and balances and buries scrutiny under noise, daring you to notice everything. I went back and removed 4 items as I tried reducing this. You're living through a history book. This time is as consequential to this country as our major wars, the New Deal, and the Depression. Do something today. Call, write, protest, convert, boycott, whatever you want. Pick one action and push back. Hard. Post here what new thing you did today. Maybe you'll inspire someone else halfway across the country with your action. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what’s going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today . #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/carney-trump-meeting 2. https://go.govbrief.today/us-spy-greenland 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-hamas-hostages 4. https://go.govbrief.today/rename-persian-gulf 5. https://go.govbrief.today/office-palestinian-affairs 6. https://go.govbrief.today/china-us-talks 7. https://go.govbrief.today/steiner-postmaster-general 8. https://go.govbrief.today/CDC-infectious-committee 9. https://go.govbrief.today/prasad-fda-vaccines 10. https://go.govbrief.today/energy-star-shutdown 11. https://go.govbrief.today/pbs-kids-terminated 12. https://go.govbrief.today/columbia-researchers-terminated 13. https://go.govbrief.today/uwash-palestine-boeing 14. https://go.govbrief.today/scotrus-transgender-ban 15. https://go.govbrief.today/us-ceasefire-yemen 16. https://go.govbrief.today/f18-crashes-sea 17. https://go.govbrief.today/telemessage-plaintext-waltz 18. https://go.govbrief.today/nsa-cut-2k 19. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-new-holidays 20. https://go.govbrief.today/us-deportees-libya 21. https://go.govbrief.today/us-deport-ukraine 22. https://go.govbrief.today/judges-block-aea 23. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-demands-return 24. https://go.govbrief.today/CBP-photos-entrants 25. https://go.govbrief.today/nypd-ice-record 26. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-issues-covid-aid-max 27. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-blocks-trump-library 28. https://go.govbrief.today/bisignano-confirmed-socsec 29. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-abolish-fema 30. https://go.govbrief.today/tillis-no-martin 31. https://go.govbrief.today/guiliani-world-cup 32. https://go.govbrief.today/ntsb-vicechair-removed 33. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-no-rail 34. https://go.govbrief.today/bush-skip-event Imgur - only made it through a fraction of your well-wishes and driving to a surgeon followup in 30 minutes. Will catch up later, but thank you all from everything I am. This is why I chose here and why I stay here. Love y'all!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: I Accidentally Became My High School Group Chat’s Profile Pic
item.description: https://youtu.be/5F3G0vdS9hY?si=zOn2GYHEHoHMErBP I am not gonna post here every time I upload to YouTube (unless you all want me to?), but since I just started the channel I wanted to share that this vid exists with my fans who are looking to see more long form content and stories from me. Not trying to make FP with this post, just posting for my followers here! Anyway, in this vid I tell you a little story of the morning I accidentally became the sexy profile picture of my long time high school, bro-dominated, group chat… Also yes, I did a whole photoshoot to replicate Youtube thumbnails... How did I do? Is it Youtubey enough? https://youtu.be/5F3G0vdS9hY?si=zOn2GYHEHoHMErBP
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Yup
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: I've got Etch A Sketch hair now! <3
item.description:
Isn't it peachy keen!??! It's my first time with a crazy hair color so I thought I'd play 4D chess and just dye the bottom because I'm terrified it's gonna cost me at least tree fiddy to constantly retouch my roots!
I feel like I'm *this* much closer to achieving my dream of becoming an Actual Cartoon Character/Pokemon Gym Leader. Stay tuned for an unrelated video I'm working on that may or may not post today (likely tomorrow)!
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: Feels weird to proud of this area
item.description:
https://www.nytimes.com/2025/05/07/us/salt-lake-city-boise-pride-flags.html?smid=nytcore-android-share
https://apnews.com/article/boise-salt-lake-city-pride-flags-law-13c8f9f7269d1b33daaa7ef041c6c497 https://www.ktvb.com/article/news/local/bosie-city-council-approves-flag-resolution-adopting-pride-flag-official-city-flag/277-1b75bb76-a807-4c7a-b862-b2ddb7c9aae1
But gosh darn it i might even come back home to visit yall now. And I WILL be bumpin Dixon Dallas across the Magic Valley, they can't stop me. We meet sunrise at Java! This chick wants her bowl o' soul
item.dc:creator: currentlywithoutimagination

item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: This might be the saddest time of my life.
item.description:
I am completely heartbroken it has come to this end after so long. For so much of the relationship she was a very different person, but an autoimmune disorder and then alcoholism turned her into the farthest person from whom she once was. Last weekend she got her Second DUI in 7 years. in between those she has stolen from friends, family, and myself to feed her habit. She had become violent when drunk and would drink until she blacked out and collapsed. I had taken her to the hospital for help a number of times but it never stuck, she doesn't want help. Once in therapy years ago she told my therapist she would choose booze over me, I never wanted to believe it but it has become so painfully true. Her behavior has alienated all of her oldest and most dear friends & family as well as becoming absolutely incapable of being a trusted person. 50% chance I might be able to keep my house and car in the divorce but if not I start over from the ground up. I just know I can't go on watching her do this to herself anymore. thanks for taking the time to read my little venting rant. much peace to all you and your loved ones.
Here, have an empty broken hearted meme.
item.dc:creator: AdrienMenges

item.title: Doubling Down
item.description: A silly short for my ongoing series, Stone's Coast, featuring the last known giant Velverelle. You can read more here! https://tapas.io/bak3nator/series Art by Setzeri, check out his Lotta series too if you enjoy the artstyle! https://www.setzcomics.com/lotta
item.dc:creator: Bak3nator

item.title: Mermay day 7, blackberry! [OC]
item.description:
And for day 7 we’ve got an adorable blackberry mermaid! We’ve done it!! A full week of mermaids ;D only 3 more weeks to go!
Look how far we already got :D
And here is an overview of the past week- do you have a favourite? Thank you so much for all the support over this past week! I look forward to the next one <3 If you like my stuff and want to see more, don’t hesitate to support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: Beware the Maelstrom
item.description: Englishpluspodcast.com: A maelstrom is a tremendously powerful whirlpool. These natural phenomena form when powerful currents collide or rush through narrow channels, creating a relentless, swirling mass of water.
